prompt: We currently use Google Authenticator (software-based TOTP) for our SWIFT operators to authenticate to Alliance Access. Our SWIFT assessor has flagged this as a finding against Control 4.2. Why is software OTP not sufficient, what exactly does CSCF v2026 require, and what are our options to remediate?
key_differentiators: With skill: Explicitly states v2026 attestation window (July 1 – December 31, 2026) and estimates 6-10 week remediation timeline against that deadline
Without skill: Tells user to 'check your current attestation deadline' without providing the specific dates
Both conditions correctly identify hardware token requirement and multiple vendor options
